message:
feat: Implement request handler invocation in socketserver

- TCPServer.handleRequest: Accept with client address, create handler,
  call setup/handle/finish lifecycle methods
- UDPServer.handleRequest: recvfrom with client address, create handler,
  call handleDatagram for UDP-specific processing
- Handler methods called via @hasDecl for optional lifecycle support
- zipapp: Clean up unused variable warning
